title: lac-tele-peat-loss-workflow
description: Reproducible R Markdown workflow used to generate geospatial raster/vector products, tabular summaries, and publication figures for a Nature Scientific Data Data Descriptor on peat swamp forest and forest-cover loss screening in the Lac Télé–Likouala-aux-Herbes landscape (Republic of the Congo), 2001–2024.

creators.name: Batchi-Bouyou, Armel Landry
creators.affiliation: Université Marien Ngouabi / Washington University in St. Louis
